news.summary: The president has sought to force Iran to accept his terms on its nuclear program or else face renewed war. An emboldened Iran has rebuffed Trump’s demands.

news.title: Ebola Was Identified in Congo Weeks Before W.H.O. Declared an Emergency
news.summary: Early surveillance and testing failed to identify the rare species of Ebola responsible for the current outbreak. An American doctor is among the confirmed cases.

news.title: Millions Recovered in FIFA Corruption Scandal May Now Be Missing Again Before World Cup
news.summary: Ahead of the World Cup, the head of South American soccer faces an ethics complaint he received payments recovered from a 2015 investigation that shook global soccer.

news.title: Russia’s New Human Rights Commissioner Accused of Helping Kidnap Ukrainian Children
news.summary: Yana Lantratova was instrumental in helping the chairman of her party to illegally adopt an infant girl from Russian-occupied Ukraine, the Ukrainian authorities say.

news.title: Nauru Hopes You Will Call It by a New Name
news.summary: Tiny Nauru could soon be called Naoero.

news.title: U.S. Hits Top Cuban Officials With Sanctions
news.summary: The Trump administration, ratcheting up its effort to cripple the Cuban government, also imposed sanctions on three government agencies, including the police.

news.title: Étienne Davignon Dies Before Trial in Patrice Lumumba Killing
news.summary: Étienne Davignon had been set to stand trial in connection with the murder of Patrice Lumumba, the first prime minister of what is now the Democratic Republic of Congo.

news.title: South Korea and Japan’s Leaders Are Set to Meet: What to Know
news.summary: Japan’s prime minister, Sanae Takaichi, and South Korea’s president, Lee Jae Myung, have surprised many observers by moving past their nations’ historical grievances.

news.title: Trump Threatens Iran and Then Pulls Back, All in the Same Day
news.summary: President Trump has repeatedly said he’ll restart military action against Iran, only to stop short of plunging the United States directly back into an unpopular war.

news.title: When Nationalism Beats Nationalism
news.summary: A progressive, pluralistic nationalism has prevailed at the polls in Scotland and Wales. Could it gain traction elsewhere?

news.title: Scientists Tweaked the Global Warming Outlook. So Trump Weighed In.
news.summary: Renewable energy has helped make the worst-case scenario a bit less bad. The president said, falsely, it shows that climate scientists were wrong all along.

news.title: G7 Finance Ministers Look to Contain Iran Economic Fallout
news.summary: Top policymakers were expected to discuss rising energy prices and sanctions policy at a critical summit in Paris this week.

news.title: Catastrophe Is Emerging in the World’s Most Vulnerable Places
news.summary: The humanitarian relief system, decimated by cuts, faces a grave challenge as the Middle East war causes soaring costs for food, fuel and fertilizer.

news.title: What to Know About the Ebola Outbreak as Cases and Deaths Rise
news.summary: More than 130 deaths and over 500 cases are suspected. The United States restricted entry for people who have been to three African countries after a global health emergency was declared.

《崩坏：星穹铁道》阿哈时刻：「姬子•启行」
news.summary:
「无论拥有怎样复杂的过去，无论去往多么遥远的未来，我们之间的关系也不会改变。我是星穹列车的领航员，姬子，永远与你眺望同一风景的家人。」
 
有人并肩，有人守望，「开拓」从不是孤帆远航。
她画下拓星的奇迹，银轨绵延，无名客们再次起航，照亮星河的长夜——终点处，她再度回望，启行的梦从未搁浅。
==========
阿哈！特别庆祝姬子•启行获得：
✧「星穹列车咖啡主理人」第1名 ✧
✧「但我的机器人在你之上」第1名 ✧
==========

日文CV：田中理惠
韩文CV：김보나
